search_parameters.q: For Kumaraguru College of Technology in India (Coimbatore), search the official website, academic programs directory, and course listings to find undergraduate degree programs (Bachelor's/B.Tech/B.A./B.Sc. programs). Include program names like 'Computer Science', 'Bachelor of Engineering', 'B.A. in Economics', etc. You can also infer programs based on faculty/departments listed on their site. Return valid JSON with this format: { "ug_programs": ["program1", "program2", ...], "total_count": number, "source": "url or 'inferred from departments'" }. Return an empty array if genuinely no data is available.

    "B.Tech. Textile Technology"
  ],

}
